Consider the set of pairs
\[
P=\{(j,i): 1\le j\le M,\ 1\le i\le M,\ j\mid b_i\}.
\]

- Fix \(i\). The number of \(j\in\{1,\dots,M\}\) dividing \(b_i\) equals the number of positive divisors of \(b_i\), denoted \(d(b_i)\), because \(b_i\le M\). Hence

  |P|=\sum_{i=1}^M d(b_i).

\]

\]
